violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. There was no employee available at the beginning of the inspection certified in food safety management. There must be an employee certified in food safety management available during all hours of prepping/operation. Resource provided with a list of approved food safety management courses. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

Scouring pad and food debris were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Dishwasher was repaired during inspection with proper concentration of chlorine sanitizer. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

ROP (vacuum packaged) crabmeat was observed thawing in the prep unit in the original packaging. Temperature of crabmeat observed at 36 degrees F. ROP seafood must be removed from packaging when thawing to allow oxygen to enter in order to protect against foodborne illness. Crabmeat was removed from packaging during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

Individual cutting boards and the cutting board of the prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the dishwasher/3-bay sink area do not have coving. Coving has pulled away from the wall. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Hand washing sink was observed with a scouring pad in it. Scouring pad was removed and soap was supplied at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

The cutting boards in the (kitchen/prep area) are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024
2 door sliding refrigerator was observed with duct tape on handles. Materials must me smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non- absorbent. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

Beverage tubing was observed in contact with ice used for drinks at the bar. Beverage tubing and cold plate beverage cooling devices must not be in contact with stored ice. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (pots and pans, ice machine) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the (ware washing area) do not have intact coving. Coving must be repaired. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024
Hood was observed with a large amount of grease build up. Hood system must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024
